arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Wolves in the Premier League this weekend as Ange Postecoglou looks to relieve some of the pressure on his position. A defeat at Nottingham Forest on Boxing Day was the club’s fourth loss in five Premier League games. The North Londoners are 12th in the table and already 11 points adrift of […] The post Tottenham vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Wolves Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Wolves will look to maintain their revival under Vitor Pereira when they take on on-of-sorts Tottenham in the Premier League today. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, ...

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Wolves
arts.sum: Tottenham vs Wolves kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. The show begins about 30 minutes before kick-off at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, bringing supporters team news and talking points before the 3pm start.

arts.ttl: Alfie Dorrington Tottenham decision looms as Ange Postecoglou waits on Radu Dragusin injury news
arts.sum: If Dragusin sits out the Wolves match through injury and Dorrington watches on from the bench with someone else filling in at centre-back then you would have to question if he will ever start a senior game for Tottenham. Archie Gray has filled in well at the heart of defence recently but Tottenham may now be in a position where the 18-year-old is their most experienced centre-back against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Is Matheus Cunha available for Wolves vs Tottenham? Suspension truth and FPL latest
arts.sum: Fantasy Premier League managers may have been sweating this week over what to do with Wolves star Matheus Cunha after claims emerged he had been suspended ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash against Tottenham Hotspur . Spurs, on the other hand, will be without Spence as he serves the one-game suspension following his red card.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Wolves – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham host Wolves this weekend in a contest that will be both team’s last match of 2024. Spurs fell to another slender defeat on their travels on Boxing Day as they lost 1-0 to high-flying Nottingham Forest. There is a high likelihood that Ange Postecoglou will be without any senior centre-backs this weekend. arts.ttl: 15 players set to miss Tottenham vs Wolves after Matheus Cunha suspension update
arts.sum: Radu Dragusin is the latest Spurs star to have picked up an injury with an ankle issue seeing him subbed off in the 1-0 defeat to Nottingham Forest. Tottenham are not the only Premier League club dealing with numerous injuries as Sunday's opponents Wolves also have several stars unavailable.

arts.ttl: Premier League fans’ half-term reports, part two: Leicester to Wolves
arts.sum: Fans rate the best and worst of the season so far – the stars, the flops and what needs to change in 2024 Part one: Arsenal to Ipswich Well, we’re not bottom, but there’s no getting away from the fact that we have, at times, looked like the worst team in the league, and by some distance. Danny Ward, Wout Faes and James Justin have turned in some astonishingly bad performances this season. Facundo Buonanotte has been a rare bright spark. arts.sum: Former Tottenham winger Andros Townsend believes Spurs forward Son Heung-min still has so much to give in the Premier League despite the South Korean's worrying form this season
